case_title: WINETRUB, MARILYN VS GAXIOLA, DONALD DBA RESIDENTIAL SHEET METAL CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINETRUB, MARILYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAXIOLA, DONALD DBA RESIDENTIAL SHEET METAL CO. $901.00 PRINCIPAL, $926.00 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,852.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT RENDERED ON JUNE 19, 1984 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 426317 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINETRUB, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT GAXIOLA, DONALD DBA RESIDENTIAL SHEET METAL CO.
